5+ Years of Excellence
About

The Artist
Behind the Look

I'm Liizi — a passionate hair artist dedicated to transforming not just your hair, but your entire sense of self. Every cut, every color, every style is an intentional act of artistry.

Based in Bayonne, NJ, I specialize in creating bold, custom color and flawless finishes that turn heads and build confidence.

My studio is your sanctuary — a space where luxury, creativity, and self-expression meet.

Services

Curated Hair Experiences

01
Precision Cut & Style

A tailored haircut designed around your face shape, lifestyle, and personal aesthetic. Every snip is intentional.

02
Color & Highlights

From natural sun-kissed balayage to bold vivid transformations — custom color that moves, shines, and turns heads.

Book to consult on pricing
03
Blowout & Finishing

Glossy, voluminous, and camera-ready. A luxury blowout that lasts from boardroom to banquet.

Book to consult on pricing
04
Bridal Hair

Your wedding day deserves perfection. From elegant updos to romantic waves — hair that photographs beautifully all day.

Book to consult on pricing
05
Hair Treatment

Deep conditioning, keratin, and repair treatments that restore vitality, softness, and luminous shine.

Book to consult on pricing
06
Extensions

Premium hair extensions for instant length and volume. Natural-looking, seamlessly blended, and long-lasting.
